missions.title: Just Get Everyone to Check In
missions.summary: Get at least one Guardian from every family to check in with Athena.
missions.incompleteNote: Reach out and invite them to check in with Athena.
missions.completeMessage: Every family has checked in. The Guardian Network is awake.
missions.athenaDirective: This Guardian is on Mission 0: at least one Guardian from every family needs to check in with Athena. Warmly and naturally encourage this Guardian to reach out to the other Guardians — especially the families who haven't checked in yet — and invite them to log in and meet you.

missions.title: Decryption
missions.summary: Athena intercepted an encrypted message. Help her decrypt it — prove you're human — and your family will uncover its corner of a map torn in four.
missions.incompleteNote: Their corner is still encrypted — reach out so they can run the decryption.
missions.completeMessage: Every corner recovered — the map is whole. The Guardians will gather at the place it reveals; bring your compass.
missions.athenaDirective: This Guardian is on the Decryption mission: you intercepted an encrypted message and need a human to help decrypt it through the Decryption console. Follow the current mission-phase instructions below so you reveal only what this Guardian has unlocked.
